mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_plans (user_id, title, places_json, total_distance, transit_fare, taxi_fare, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{placesJson}, #{totalDistance}, #{transitFare}, #{taxiFare}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, title, places_json AS placesJson, total_distance AS totalDistance, transit_fare AS transitFare, taxi_fare AS taxiFare, created_at AS createdAt FROM travel_plans WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_plans SET title = #{title}, places_json = #{placesJson}, total_distance = #{totalDistance}, transit_fare = #{transitFare}, taxi_fare = #{taxiFare} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM travel_plans WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
